name: Edmunds API
description: The Edmunds API provides access to an extensive dataset of vehicle information including specifications, pricing (True Market Value and True Cost to Own), editorial content, dealer information, safety ratings, recalls, maintenance schedules, consumer reviews, and vehicle photos. Authentication is via API key passed as a query parameter.
